creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
the msql2d.sh script calls su with the argument '${PREFIX}/bin/msql2d'
in single quotes.  The ${PREFIX} is not expanded, so it fails since
PREFIX is not in su's environment.

Fix: 

change the single quotes to double quotes in the argument to su in the
start line.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
install msql, run the startup script.
